reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
바잇미 믿고쓰는 제품이죠^^
항상 구매해서 사용하는제품입니다^^
처음 인터넷으로 여기저기 알아보고 좋은제품찾아보다가 알게된 바잇미^^!!
다목적세저랑 빨래 설거지 다쓸수있어서 너무좋아요
장난감 밥그릇 입에 닿는거라 좋은제품으로쓰고싶어서 많이찾아보다가 구매했어요
저희강쥐 애기때부터 3년째 쓰고있는제품이예요^^
장난감 이불 옷 세탁할때도쓰고
식기류 설거지할때도 사용하고^^
바잇미는 다른상품들도좋죠^^
바잇미 겨울발열패딩조끼, 발세정제,벌레퇴치제 등등 여러가지용품 사용중이예요^^
항상 잘사용하고있어요^^
reviews.content_en: BITE ME is a product I trust and use consistently ^^ I always purchase and use this product ^^ I first discovered BITE ME by searching online for good pet products ^^ It's great because it's a multi-purpose cleanser that works for laundry, dishes, and more. Since it touches my pup's toys, food bowls, and mouth, I wanted to use a high-quality product, so I did a lot of research before buying ^^ I've been using this for 3 years since my Kangji was a baby ^^ I use it when washing toys, blankets, and clothes, and also for washing dishes ^^ BITE ME has other great products too ^^ I'm currently using various BITE ME products including their winter heated padding vest, paw cleanser, and insect repellent ^^ I'm always using them well ^^

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
보름 찐사용후기!
우선 설겆이할 때 멈머식기 거품도 잘나고 정말 뽀득하게 잘 씻겨요
저희멈머 굉장히 깔끔(?)예민해서,,
식기에 뭔가 냄새가 난다싶으면 물조차도 안먹는 멈머라
그동안 베이킹소다로 열심히 닦아주고 베이킹소다 자체가 잘 세척되지 않아 여러번 행굼에 너무 힘들었는데ㅠ
바잇미세제로 시간단축 단숨에 해결과 예민한 저희 멈머후각에 통과되었는지,,설겆이 후 의심의 여지없이 물과 사료 모두 잘 먹어용!
그리고 저는 너무 마음에 들었던게 
다목적세제이다보니
멈머의 장난감 세척도 가능해서 너무 좋았어용!
이 전에는 베이비용 세탁용세제 따로 구매해서 멈머 장난감 세척 빨래해줬었는데 
한 제품으로 두가지 모두 해결되서 대만족!
세척후에도 잘 세척됐는지 아가가 부담을가질만한 강한향은 아닌지 모두 검토해봤는데 통과통과였어용!
이번 구매 때 귀여운 수세미와 함께 증정받을 수 있어서 아기자기 제품 좋아한 저로써는 득템이댜!하며 받았네용
이번에 모두 사용하고나면 저는 앞으로도 이 제품 계속 사용하게 될것같아용^^
reviews.content_en: Review after two weeks of real use! First, when washing dishes, the detergent creates great bubbles and cleans really squeaky clean. My Mommy is incredibly picky(?), so if there's even a slight smell on the dishes, she won't even drink water. Up until now I've been scrubbing hard with baking soda, but since baking soda itself doesn't rinse off well, rinsing multiple times was really exhausting ㅠ With BITE ME detergent, I saved time and solved it all at once, and apparently it passed my picky Mommy's sense of smell because after washing, she's been eating both water and food without hesitation! And what I really loved was that since it's a multi-purpose cleanser, I could also clean Mommy's toys, which was amazing! Before this, I had to buy separate baby laundry detergent to wash Mommy's toys and do laundry, but now I can solve both with one product—I'm completely satisfied! After cleaning, I checked everything to make sure it was well-cleaned and that there wasn't a strong smell that could burden the baby, and it passed all checks! When I purchased this time, I received a cute scrubber as a gift, so as someone who loves adorable products, I was thrilled to get such a great item! Once I use everything this time, I think I'll keep using this product going forward ^^

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content:
고양이들 식기 이 제품으로 세척하고 있어요. 절반 이상 사용하고 있고 점점 줄어들어서 마침 사야했기에 바잇미 앱에 들어왔다가 리필이 나온거보고 구매해요. 저는 식기 위주로만 사용했고 다른건 세척 안 해봤는데 한 번 해보려고요.
식기 세척할 때도 거품 잘나고 헹굼도 잘되서 뽀득하니 좋았어요. 고양이들 식기 세척은 이 제품으로 한동안 계속 쓸 것 같아요.
reviews.content_en: I'm using this product to clean my cats' dishes. I've used more than half of it and it's gradually running out, so I came to the BITE ME app right when I needed to reorder, and I saw they had a refill option so I purchased it. I've only used it mainly for dishes and haven't tried cleaning other things yet, but I'm planning to try it. The bubbles come out nicely when washing dishes and rinsing works well too, so it cleans squeaky clean and I'm happy with it. I think I'll keep using this product for my cats' dishes for a while.

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 여지껏 다른브랜드 썼었는데 용량이 너무 아쉬위서 이번에 바잇미에서 구매해봤습니다.우선 강아지한테 안전하딘 성분이라는게 정말 좋고 대용량 리필이 아주아주 맘에드네요^^무색무취에 밥그릇 물그릇 깨끗이 잘닦겨요ㅎㅎ장난감이나 옷빨래도 가능하다해서 일단 산책용으로 입닦는수건 손빨래해봤는데 때도 잘빠지네요..다음엔 장난감이랑 옷빨래도 해봐야겠어요.,
reviews.content_en: I used a different brand until now, but the quantity was disappointing, so this time I tried purchasing from BITE ME. First of all, it's really great that it's a dog-safe formula, and I absolutely love the large refill size ^^ It's colorless and odorless, and it cleans food and water bowls really well ㅎㅎ They said it can also be used for washing toys and clothes, so I first tried hand-washing a walk towel for wiping my pup's mouth, and it removes stains really well too.. Next time I should try washing toys and clothes as well..

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
강아지용 세제는 쭈욱 갖고싶었는데 차일피일 미루다가 드디어 구입하게 되었네요. 성분도 순하고 무향이고 보틀디자인도 마음에 쏙 들고ㅎㅎ
같이 오는 수세미가 정말 귀엽네요.
추가로 수세미도 더 주문했어요.
강아지 수세미는 옆으로 넓어서 고양이 수세미로
주문했습니다. 말모말모 둘다 넘 귀엽다!
후기에 수세미를 세제입구에 끼워서 보관하신분 보고
저도 그렇게 보관중입니다ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I've always wanted to have a dog detergent, but kept putting it off, and finally got around to purchasing it. The ingredients are gentle, it's fragrance-free, and I love the bottle design ㅎㅎ The scrubber that comes with it is really cute. I even ordered extra scrubbers. I ordered the dog scrubber for cats since it's wider on the sides. Both Mal and Mal are so cute! I saw someone in the reviews storing the scrubber by inserting it into the detergent opening, so I'm storing mine that way too ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 바잇이 세제 꾸준히 안떨어지고 매번구매하는 1인입니다~~평소 그릇닦는 세제가 강아지한테 독이될수있고 안좋다는 이야기를 듣고 세제당장바꿔서 사용하고있는데요~~ 리필용으로 나왔으면좋겠다 계속생각했었는데 출시되어서 너무좋네요ㅎ 1L라꽤오래 쓸꺼같아요ㅎ다음에 떨어지면 또재구매하려구요~~감사합니다~~
reviews.content_en: I'm someone who consistently buys BITE ME detergent and never runs out ~~ I heard that regular dish detergent can be toxic to dogs and isn't good, so I switched detergents right away and have been using it ~~ I kept thinking it would be nice if a refill came out, and now that it's released I'm so happy ㅎ 1L seems like it will last quite a while ㅎ I plan to repurchase when it runs out next time ~~ Thank you ~~

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
진짜 몇년째 꾸준히 쓰고 있는 제품입니다..
저번에 구입한 리필용 많이 남아 있는데
본품 용기를 새걸로 바꿔주고 싶어서 또 구입했어요 ㅎㅎ
마침 세일도 엄청 해서 너무 좋네요 :)
reviews.content_en: This is a product I've been consistently using for several years.. I still have a lot of refill left from my last purchase, but I bought it again because I wanted to switch the main container to a new one ㅎㅎ There's also a huge sale going on right now, so I'm really happy :)

reviews.name: 융****
reviews.content: 드디어 다목적 세제 리필이 출시됐다니ㅠㅠ감격쓰,,요걸로 울 갱얼즤 장난감, 옷, 식기 다 세척해야 해서 늘 쟁여져 있는 최애템 중 하나예용!! 근데 본품을 사고 버리기에는 플라스틱이 자꾸 발생해서 환경에 신경쓰였는데 이제 본품 통에 리필해서 사용할 수 있으니 쬐끔이나마 죄책감 덜었슴미댜ㅎㅎ출시 기념으로 할인 때리길래 저도 얼렁 달려가서 구매 때렸습죠^-^리필용 2개 쟁여놨더니 마음이 든든하네욘 반려동물 키우는 사람들에게 필수품이니 할인 자주 해주세용>,!@
reviews.content_en: Finally a multi-purpose detergent refill has been released ㅠㅠ This is such a touching moment,, I use this for cleaning my Gangyeol's toys, clothes, and dishes, so it's always one of my must-have items!! But I was concerned about the environment because I had to throw away the plastic bottle every time I finished the main product, but now I can refill into the original bottle and use it, which makes me feel a bit less guilty hehe The release was on sale so I quickly went and made a purchase ^-^ Now that I have 2 refills stocked up, I feel reassured! This is an essential item for anyone with pets, so please offer discounts frequently >,!@

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
항상 강아지 식기는 따뜻한 물로만 세척했는데
매일 입에 닿는 거라 더 깨끗하게 세척해주는게 좋을거 같아서 세제를 구매하려고 찾아보다가 성분도 착하고 리뷰도 많은 바잇미 세제를 구매했어요 : ) 역시 리뷰대로 거품도 잘 나고 세정력도 좋고 향도 없어서 좋아요! 식기세척뿐 아니라 장난감 의류세척도 가능하다고 해서 너무 마음에 들어요^^ 같이 들어있는 수세미도 너무 귀여워서 자꾸만 사용하고 싶어져요☺️
reviews.content_en: I always washed my dog's dishes with just warm water, but since it touches her mouth every day, I thought it would be good to clean it more thoroughly, so I looked for a detergent to buy and found BITE ME detergent, which has good ingredients and many reviews :) Just as the reviews said, the bubbles come out well, the cleaning power is great, and it's fragrance-free, which is awesome! I'm so happy that it can be used not just for dishes but also for cleaning toys and clothing ^^ The scrubber that comes with it is so cute that I keep wanting to use it ☺️

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 냥이들 용품이나 식기 세척은 항상 더블버블 제품을 사용하고 있어요. 리필 제품이 나왔으면 좋겠다고 생각했는데 마침 알림이 와서 너무 신기했네요 ㅎㅎ 받자마자 기존에 있던 용기에 리필해서 잘 사용하고 있습니다 :)
reviews.content_en: I always use Double Bubble products for my cat's items and dish washing. I was thinking I wish they'd release a refill product, and then the notification came at just the right time, which was so cool ㅎㅎ As soon as I got it, I refilled my existing container and I'm using it well :)

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 강아지들도 전용 세제를 써줘야 좋다고 해서 구매했습니다 식기뿐만 아니라 여러용도로 쓸 수 있어 더 좋은거 같아요 ㅎㅎ 오자마자 식기랑 장난감 박박 씻어줬습니다 다쓰면 또 재구매 하러 올게요!
reviews.content_en: I bought this because I heard dogs need their own dedicated detergent. It's even better because I can use it for more than just dishes 😄 I scrubbed the dishes and toys right when it arrived. I'll be back to buy more once I run out!

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content: 더블버블 세통째쓰고있는데 리필 출시되어서 바로 구매했어용 식기 그릇 옷 등등 휘뚜루마뚜루 사용하기 너무 조아요!
reviews.content_en: I'm on my third bottle of Double Bubble and just grabbed the refill as soon as it came out! I use it for everything - dishes, bowls, clothes, you name it - and I absolutely love it! 😄

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 다목적이라 효과는 어떨지 미지수였는데 생각보다 너무 좋네요 사람용 식기도 바잇미 세정제로 쓰고 있는데 너무 잘 닦이고 세정력도 좋고 냄새가 안나서 더 좋아요. 바잇미에서 특별히 많이구매한 고객을 위해 준비해서 보내주신 연말 크리스마스 선물과 쿠폰 너무 기분 좋게 받았어요 이렇게 정성스러운 선물을 매년 보내 주시니 바잇미에서 계속 구매하게 되네요 돌볼 아이들이 넘 많아 유난히 더 힘든 겨울 바잇미에서 보내주신 선물로 조금은 맘이 따수워 졌어요  감사드리고 더욱 번창 하는 바잇미가 되길 바래요
reviews.content_en: I wasn't sure how effective a multi-purpose product would be, but it's so much better than expected! I even use BITE ME detergent on my own dishes - it cleans really well, has great cleaning power, and doesn't have a strong smell. I was so touched by the year-end Christmas gift and coupon BITE ME sent to loyal customers like me. Getting such thoughtful gifts every year keeps me coming back to BITE ME. With so many pets to care for, winter is especially tough, but the gift from BITE ME warmed my heart. Thank you so much, and I wish for BITE ME to keep thriving! 💕

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
마지막에 사료통 다 헹구고 뽀득뽀득하게 소리나는 동영상도 찍었는데 안 올라가네여😭😭
9살 아토피가 심한 아이와 살고 있어요!
올 여름에 피부가 갑자기 너무 심해져 집안 환경을 대대적으로 바꾸려고 식기를 알아보던 중 식기도 중요하지만 세제도 무척이나 중요하다는 것을 알게 됐어요!
하지만 어떤 것을 사야할지 몰라 알아보기만 했는데 바잇미가 식기세척 뿐만 아니라 의류,용품까지 다 세탁이 가능하다고 하여 바잇미 세제를 선택했어요!
성분을 볼 줄은 모르지만 천연성분에 거의 1등급으로 자신있게 표기가 되어 있으미 믿고 구매했습니다!😊
오자마자 마침 사료통도 비워지고 새로 산 옷도 빨아봤어요! 사료 그릇이나 사료통은 일반세제로 세척해도 계속 미끄러워서 베이킹소다로 여러번 세척하곤 하는데 바잇미 세제가 오고 나서부터는 바잇미 세제로 한큐에 해결 가능합니다!
그리고 한가지 팁을 알려드리자면 수세미는 사실 2주에 한번씩 교체를 해주는게 가장 좋다고 해요! 
뽀드득하게 세척이 너무 되질 않는다면 수세미 교체를 해보시기를..!!😎😎
reviews.content_en: I even filmed a video of the food bowl squeaking clean at the end, but it didn't upload 😭😭 I live with a 9-year-old with severe atopy! His skin suddenly got really bad this summer, so I decided to overhaul our home environment. While looking into food bowls, I realized that the detergent is just as important as the dishes themselves! I was unsure what to choose, so I just researched. When I found out that BITE ME could clean not just dishes, but also clothes and pet items, I decided to give it a try! I'm not great at reading ingredient lists, but I felt confident buying it since it's marked as almost top-tier natural ingredients 😊 Right when it arrived, the food container had just emptied and I washed some new clothes too! Food bowls and containers always feel slippery even after cleaning with regular detergent, so I used to scrub them multiple times with baking soda. But since I got BITE ME detergent, I can solve it in one go! And here's a tip: sponges should actually be replaced every two weeks for best results! If your dishes aren't squeaking clean, try replacing your sponge! 😎😎

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 강아지 장난감이랑 식기는 늘 입에 닿는 것들이라 세척에 대한 고민이 있었고 특히 식기는 사료 그릇이랑은 항상 세척하고나서 미끌거리는 느낌이 있었는데 이 세제를 사용하니까 소량 사용에도 거품도 많이 나고 완전 뽀득뽀득해서 너무 좋아요! 장난감도 이 세제 사용해서 손빨래 했는데 때도 잘 빠져요! 때가 너무 잘 빠져서 이렇게 더러웠었구나 하고 깜짝 놀랬답니다…ㅎㅎ 이거 진짜 강추에요!!
reviews.content_en: I was always concerned about cleaning dog toys and dishes since they're always in their mouth. Especially food bowls - they always felt slippery even after washing. But with this detergent, even a small amount creates lots of bubbles and leaves dishes so squeaky clean! I hand-washed the toys with this detergent too and the dirt came right off! I was shocked at how much dirt came off - I didn't realize they were that dirty 😄 I really recommend this!!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 항상 사용하는 세제인데 다양하게 멈머들꾸로 사용할 수 있어서 만족하면서 사용하고 있어요!!!
reviews.content_en: I use this detergent all the time and I'm really satisfied with it because I can use it for so many different things! ❤️❤️

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
세제랑 수세미 세트를 구매했습니당ㅎㅎㅎ
수세미는 너무 귀여워서 구매했구
세제는 사람꺼보단 순하지 않을까 싶어서 구매했어요
평소 미끌거리는 밥그릇과 물그릇은 따뜻한물에 수세미로만 닦아봤는데 힘들었거든요... 근데 이 세제 사용하니까 세정력도 좋고 향도 강하지 않아서 만족합니당ㅎㅎㅎ
향이 강하지 않은지 밥 바로 줬는데 잘 먹어용😝
reviews.content_en: I bought the detergent and sponge set 😊 I got the sponge because it's so cute, and I bought the detergent because I thought it might be gentler than the kind for people. Normally, the rice bowl and water bowl get slippery and I could only wipe them with a sponge in warm water, which was hard work... But with this detergent, it cleans really well and doesn't have a strong smell, so I'm happy 😊 Since the smell isn't strong, I gave him food right after rinsing and he ate it just fine 😝

reviews.name: h****
reviews.content: 펌프형 계속 사용했었는데 리필은 세탁실에 두고 쓰기 너무 좋아요. 타올 장난감 매트 세탁할때 최고 !!
reviews.content_en: I was using the pump bottle before, but the refill is so convenient to keep in the laundry room. It's the best for washing towels, toys, and mats!!

reviews.name: 채****
reviews.content:
애들 밥그릇, 물그릇이 미끌미끌하면 침성분이 다 안씻긴 거라고 해서 주기적으류 베이킨소다, 구연산 등으로 씻어줬는데 너무 귀찮았거든요?
근데 바잇미 더블버블 만나고 완전 편해요!!
세정력도 좋구 거품도 잘나고!
헹구고 나서 뽀득뽀득 씻겨있어서 좋아요~
맨손으로 설거비해도 손이 건조하거나 가렵지 않구요 👍🏻
진짜 추천드려요 다음에는 세탁할때도 사용해보려구요 ^^
reviews.content_en: The kids' rice and water bowls would get slippery, and I heard that means saliva isn't being washed off completely. So I kept having to wash them periodically with baking soda and citric acid - it was such a hassle! But ever since I found BITE ME Double Bubble, it's been so much easier!! The cleaning power is great and it creates lots of bubbles! After rinsing, the dishes are squeaky clean, which is awesome. Even when I hand-wash dishes, my hands don't get dry or itchy 👍🏻 I really recommend it. Next time I'll try using it for laundry too! ^^

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 매일 식기 세척해주고 있었는데 마트에서 파는 일반 퐁퐁으로 씻길 때 마다 뭔가 불안하고 그랬어요.. 그래서 반려동물 전용 퐁퐁(?)을 사봤는데 뽀독뽀독 엄청 잘 닦이구 안심도 되네용 ㅎㅎ 아 그리구 스펀지도 넘 귀엽슴당 ㅠㅠㅠㅠ 밥그릇 씻을때 마다 기분 좋을거 같아요❣️❣️❣️ 다 쓰면 다시 재구매할거예요!! 바잇미 쵝오!
reviews.content_en: I wash the dishes every day, but I always felt uneasy using regular dish soap from the mart... So I tried a pet-specific dish soap and it cleans so squeaky clean and gives me peace of mind! 😊 And the sponge is so adorable 😭😭😭 I'll feel happy every time I wash the food bowl! I'll definitely repurchase once I run out!! BITE ME is the best! ❣️❣️❣️

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
망고의 식기나 장난감을 닦을때마다 많이 찝찝했는데 
믿고 사용할 수 있어서 너무 좋아요 :-) 
안심하고 잘 쓰고 있습니당
reviews.content_en: Every time I wash Mango's dishes and toys, I always felt uneasy about it, but now I'm so happy to use something I can trust! :-) I'm using it with peace of mind.

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 퀘퀘묵은 우래기들 장난감도 빨아주고 설거지도 해주고 다양하게 사용할 수 있어서 너무 만족스럽네용:)
reviews.content_en: It's great because I can use it in so many ways - washing old musty toys and doing dishes too. Very satisfied! :)

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
아아주 만족합니다! 믿고 쓰고 있어요!😆
원래 사람 세제 사용하기에는 많이 찝찝하고 안 좋을거 같아서 수세미로만 닦아왔는데 댕댕이들 전용 세제인데 아주 뽀득뽀득 깨끗해져요! 
울 강아지 장난감 빨래 할 때도 사용하고 있습니당! 
(참고로 수세미 졸귀네여🐶)
reviews.content_en: Very satisfied! I trust and use this product! 😆 I used to only wash with a sponge because using regular human detergent felt uncomfortable and seemed bad for them, but with this dog-specific detergent, everything gets so sparkling clean! I also use it when washing my pup's toys! (By the way, the sponge is adorable 🐶)

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content: 장난감,식기,옷 다 빨래할때 써봤는데 뽀드득소리도 계속나고 애기들 장난감이 깨끗해지는게 보여서 좋았어요!
reviews.content_en: I've tried it on toys, dishes, and clothes during laundry, and I kept hearing that squeaky clean sound. I loved seeing how clean the kids' toys got!

reviews.content:
매번 강아지 그릇 닦을때 베이킹 소다로만 세척했거든요.
요즘 강아지 세제 많이 나오는데 바잇미에도 판매하길래 다른거랑 구매할 때 같이 샀어요.
수세미가 너무 귀여워요! ㅎㅎ
과일도 씻을 수 있네요?
성분은 안심이에요!
reviews.content_en: I used to only clean my dog's bowl with baking soda. There are a lot of dog detergents out there these days, and since BITE ME sells it, I bought it together with other things. The sponge is so cute! ㅎㅎ You can wash fruits with it too? The ingredients are safe!

reviews.content: 미끌거렸던 식기를 어떻게 씻어야 할지 고민했었는데 더블버블을 쓰고 난 이후 뽀득뽀득 해지는 식기를 보고 완전 대.만.족을 했답니다^_^ 왜 이제야 샀는지 모를정도로 너무 죠아요ㅠㅠㅠ믿고 쓰는 세제 추천합니다! (강아지 수세미도 너무 귀여워요!)
reviews.content_en: I was worried about how to wash slippery dishes, but after using Double Bubble, I was completely satisfied seeing the dishes become squeaky clean! ^_^ I don't know why I didn't buy it sooner - I love it so much! ㅠㅠㅠ I recommend this trusted detergent! (The dog sponge is so cute too!)

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content:
강아지가 너무 인형을 쭙쭙하는걸 좋아하는데 
너무 비위생적일거같아 매번 인형을 새로 사주었습니다
이제 그러지않고 이 세제로 씻고 햇볕에 말리고
주어도 될거같아요
reviews.content_en: My dog loves to suck on his stuffed toys, so I was worried about hygiene and kept buying new ones. Now I don't have to do that - I can wash them with this detergent, let them dry in the sun, and give them back to him.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 강아지용 세정제를 진짜 오랫동안 찾았는데 믿고 쓸만한 브랜드가 없었어요 물티슈도 아이한텐 안좋은것처럼 사람이 쓰는 세탁,주방 세제도 안좋을거라고 생각했는데 이런 제품 있어서 너무 좋아요 만족도 굿 친한 강아지 친구한테도 선물했어요
reviews.content_en: I've been searching for a dog-safe cleanser for a really long time, but there was no trustworthy brand. I thought that just like wet wipes aren't good for kids, human laundry and kitchen detergents wouldn't be good either, so I'm so glad this product exists. Very satisfied! I even gifted it to a close dog friend of mine.

reviews.name: 진****
reviews.content: 빨래세제는 강아지 전용으로 쓰고있었는데 설거지는 항상 저녁마다 과탄산소다로 소독했는데 설거지도 되는 세제라니ㅠㅠ 보자마자 구매했어용 너무 잘닦여요~~ 특히 애들 침!!! ㅋㅋㅋ진짜 뽀득뽀득하게 잘닦여러 만족해용 수세미도 너무 귀여워요ㅜㅠ♥♥
reviews.content_en: I was using laundry detergent specifically for my dog, but I always disinfected the dishes every evening with sodium percarbonate. Then I found out there's a detergent that works for dishes too! ㅠㅠ I bought it right away. It cleans so well!! Especially the kids' drool!!! ㅋㅋㅋ It really gets things sparkling clean. Very satisfied! The sponge is so cute too ㅜㅠ♥♥

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 바잇미를 애정해 하는 사람입니당! 저는 사람 세제도 비누로 된걸 사용하는지라.. 세제 잔여물이 많이 남는다고 생각 안해서 그냥 같이 사용했는데 바잇미에서 나왔다니까 그냥 안사니 너무 생각나고 사고 싶었음.. 그래서 구매했는데 한번 펌핑해도 엄청난 거품과 세정력이긴 하고 모르겠꼬 그냥 저 바잇미 로고가 너무 이쁘고 좋아욥 ❤️
reviews.content_en: I'm someone who loves BITE ME! Since I use soap-based detergent for myself anyway, I don't think there's much residue, so I just used it together. But when I found out it was from BITE ME, I missed it so much and really wanted to buy it again. So I got it, and even with just one pump, it creates tons of bubbles and has amazing cleaning power. I'm not sure why, but I just think the BITE ME logo is so pretty and nice! ❤️

reviews.name: 안****
reviews.content:
강아지 물그릇이나 식기 닦는 건 아무거나 쓰기 좀 불안하더라고요.

그래서 95% 이상 천연성분 + 에코서트 인증 이 부분이 제일 크게 와닿아서 선택했어요.

직접 써보니까
거품이 자극적이지 않고 부드럽게 올라오는 느낌이라 마음이 놓였고, 그렇다고 세정력이 약한 건 아니라서
사료 기름기나 침 묻은 부분도 깔끔하게 잘 닦여서 만족스러웠어요.

특히 강아지 용품은
👉 잔여물 남는 게 제일 신경 쓰이는데
이 제품은 헹구고 나면 뽀득하게 마무리돼서
확실히 안심되는 느낌이에요.

손으로 직접 써도 따갑거나 건조한 느낌이 없어서
매일 물그릇 씻을 때 부담 없는 것도 좋았어요.

@내돈내산@ 입니다
reviews.content_en:
I was always anxious about using just any cleaner for my dog's water and food bowls.

So I chose this product mainly because of the 95%+ natural ingredients and EcoCert certification.

After using it myself, I was relieved because the bubbles aren't irritating and come up gently, and the cleaning power isn't weak either—it cleans off food oil residue and saliva stains really well.

Especially with dog products, 👉 residue left behind is what bothers me most, but after rinsing this product, everything feels squeaky clean, which definitely puts my mind at ease.

Even when I use it on my hands, there's no stinging or drying sensation, so it's great that I can wash the water bowl every day without worry.

@Bought with my own money@

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 식기는 항상 뜨거운 물으로 씻어주고, 옷과 장난감은 울샴푸로 세척해줬는데 조이가 물고 햝는 식기와 장난감은 늘 찜찜해서 아기용 세제를 살까 하던 참에 후기가 좋아서 구매했어요🫡 반려동물 전용 제품인데다가 세정력도 뛰어나서 완전 만족.. 본품안사고 리필산 나 자신 칭찬해..🤍 사은품으로 같이 보내주신 강아지 수세미도 넘나 귀여워요!! 앞으로 조이 세제는 바잇미 정착!
reviews.content_en: I always wash dishes with hot water, and I wash clothes and toys with wool shampoo, but I was always uneasy about Joy's dishes and toys that she chews and licks. I was thinking about buying baby detergent when I saw good reviews and decided to get this 🫡 It's a pet-exclusive product AND has excellent cleaning power, so I'm completely satisfied.. I'm patting myself on the back for buying the refill instead of the full bottle 🤍 The puppy scrubber that came as a gift is so cute too!! From now on, Joy's detergent is definitely BITE ME!

reviews.name: 반****
reviews.content:
엉ㅠㅠ 택배는 안전하게 잘 왔는데 집에서 책상에 올려뒀는데 떨어졌다가 저래 뿌가져서 잘 안나와요… ㅠㅠㅠ 
이런;; 다음에 또 사게 된다면 이거로 다시 사야겠네요… ㅠㅠ 
근데 제가 냄새 나는걸 좋아하는데 무향이라… 좀 그러긴한데..밥그릇 씻을때 좋고
특히 수세미 맘에 들어요ㅠㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 
귀여운 대다가 잘 씻겨요!! ㅋㅋ
그리고 장난감까지 빨아버렸네요… 
(야야.. 사진 찍는데 하품하고 날리야!!!! 이것 참 안되게ㅛ어ㅋㅋ)
reviews.content_en:
Oh no ㅠㅠ The delivery came safely, but I put it on the desk at home and it fell and spilled, so it doesn't come out well… ㅠㅠㅠ
Like this;; If I buy it again next time, I'll get this one again… ㅠㅠ
But I like scented products and this is unscented… that's a bit of a letdown, but it works great for washing rice bowls, and especially I love the scrubber ㅠㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ
It's cute AND cleans really well!! ㅋㅋ
And I even ended up washing toys with it…
(Ugh.. the puppy yawned and knocked things over while I was taking pictures!!!! This is just not working out ㅛㅋㅋ)

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
뽁뽁이로 꼼꼼하게 감싸져서 잘 도착했습니다!
오자마자 바로 애기 그릇과 옷 세탁 해봤어요~

1. 향
일반 세제는 향도 강하고 성분도 강쥐에게 안좋을까봐 항상 물로만 박박 씻어줬는데 이건 향도 딱 적당하게 은은하고 물로 헹구고나니 완전 무향이라 대만족!
강쥐 침때문에 물그릇 항상 미끌거리는데 씻고나니 뽀득뽀득~ 너무 기분이 좋네요ㅎㅎ
씻어서 물 다시 채워주니 바로 물 한그릇 뚝딱 하셨습니다~

2. 세정력
강쥐 옷도 맨날 쌓아만놓고 세제 살때까지 버티고 있었는데 배송 받자마자 손세탁 해주었어요~
풀밭,흙밭 많이 안 가고 뒹굴지도 않았는데 세상에나 옷에서 때구정물이…~ 깜놀했네용ㅋㅋㅋ
세정력은 정말 좋은 것 같아요! 약간 얼룩있던 것도 말끔히 지워졌어요~
빨고 나면 막 뻣뻣한 것도 없고 유연제 쓴 것처럼 너무 부드럽지도않는데 저는 그정도가 딱 좋은 것 같아요ㅎㅎ

리필도 용량이 제법 크고 소량만으로 충분히 세탁, 설거지 가능해서 꽤 오래 쓸 것 같아요!
다 쓰면 꼭 이걸루 다시 재구매 하려구요~~
reviews.content_en:
It arrived in perfect condition, carefully wrapped in bubble wrap!
I washed my baby's bowls and clothes right away when it arrived~

1. Scent
With regular detergent, the scent is strong and I was always worried it might be bad for my pup, so I only scrubbed with water. But this one has a subtle scent that's just right, and after rinsing with water it's completely scent-free—so satisfying!
My pup's water bowl always gets slimy from her saliva, but after washing it feels squeaky clean~ so happy about that ㅎㅎ
I refilled the bowl with water and she gulped it down right away~

2. Cleaning Power
I kept stacking my pup's clothes and waiting until I bought detergent, but I hand-washed them right after delivery~
She doesn't go to grassy or muddy fields much and doesn't roll around, but wow, there was so much dirt in the clothes…~ I was shocked ㅋㅋㅋ
The cleaning power is really good! Even some stubborn stains came right off~
After washing, it's not stiff or too soft like it has fabric softener—it's just the right texture for me ㅎㅎ

The refill is a good size and you only need a small amount for laundry and dishes, so it should last quite a while!
Once I finish it, I'll definitely repurchase this~~

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content:
바잇미 더블버블 다목적 세제는 정말 만족스러운 제품이에요! 강아지용 전용 세제라 확실히 순하고, 민감한 강아지 용품을 세척할 때도 안심하고 사용할 수 있어요. 거품도 적당히 나고 헹굼도 잘 돼서 사용하기 편리하더라고요.

같이 온 수세미도 너무 귀여워서 세제와 찰떡궁합이에요! 디자인도 귀엽고 실용적이라 설거지나 강아지 용품 세척할 때 기분까지 좋아져요. 강아지를 키우는 분들이라면 꼭 한번 써보시길 추천해요!
reviews.content_en:
BITE ME Double Bubble Multi-Purpose Cleaner is a really satisfying product! Since it's a dog-exclusive detergent, it's definitely gentle, and I can use it with confidence even for sensitive dog items. The bubbles are just right and it rinses well, so it's convenient to use.

The scrubber that came with it is so cute and goes perfectly with the detergent! The design is adorable and practical, so it even lifts my mood when washing dishes or cleaning dog items. If you have a dog, I definitely recommend trying this!

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content:
아이 물그릇 밥그릇 그냥 사람 먹는 그릇 설겆이 할 때 같이 했었는데 많은 분들이 각각 따로 하신다는 글을 보고 검색해서 처음으로 강아지 전용 세제를 바잇미에서 구매해봤어요~ 
향이 거의 없고 설겆이할때 금방 뽀드득거려서 세제가 그릇에 안 남고 금방 행궈지는게 바로 느껴져서 안심이되고 넘 좋네요 :) 
강아지 모양 수세미도 같이 포함인데 너무 귀여워요 ㅎㅎ 
아직 설겆이용으로만 써봤는데 다목적 세제라서 아이옷, 수건, 장난감도 모두 이 세제로 통일해서 쓰려구요 
매우 만족이라 다 쓰면 또 재구입할거에요~ 👍🏻
reviews.content_en:
I used to wash my pup's water bowls and food bowls together with regular dishes, but I saw a lot of people saying they wash them separately, so I searched and bought dog-exclusive detergent from BITE ME for the first time~
There's almost no scent and when washing dishes it squeaks right away, so the detergent doesn't linger on the dishes and rinses quickly—I can feel it immediately and it puts my mind at ease, so I love it :)
The dog-shaped scrubber is included too and it's so cute ㅎㅎ
I've only used it for dishes so far, but since it's a multi-purpose cleaner, I plan to use this one for everything—pup clothes, towels, and toys
I'm very satisfied so I'll repurchase once I finish it~ 👍🏻

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content:
강아지 배변판 식기 발판 장남감 등등 사실 이것저것 세척해야 하는 일이 많은데 사람세제로는 겁나서 알아보던 차에 바잇미에서 이 세제 보고 바로 구매했어요!
소형견 한마리라 우리집에선 용량은 괴물이네요ㅎㅎ
성분도 괜춘하고 거품도 잘나요!
배변판 삼푸로 씻다가 세제로 씻으니 속이 시원해요!
습식이랑 화식 먹은 식기는 거품 설거지 1차하고 열탕하니 더 맘이 놓여요!
같이온 스펀지도 너무 예쁘고 거품이 진쨔 잘나서 좋아요!
reviews.content_en:
There's actually a lot to clean with a dog—pee pads, dishes, mats, toys, etc., and I was scared to use regular household detergent, so I searched and found this cleaner from BITE ME and bought it right away!
Since I have a small dog, the bottle size is huge for our house ㅎㅎ
The ingredients are good and it bubbles well!
Washing the pee pad with shampoo and then with this cleaner feels so refreshing!
For dishes that had wet and dry food, I do one round of soapy washing and then hot water, which gives me extra peace of mind!
The sponge that came with it is so pretty and bubbles up really well, so I love it!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 배송도 빠르고 포장이 뾱뾱이에 꼼꼼하게 감싸서와서 파손우려게와서좋아요~ 수세미가 생각보다 엄청 귀엽고 얼른 식기류나 닦아보고싶을정도에요 ㅎㅎ 아직 사용해보진않았지만 보기만해도좋을거같아요~~ 다목적용으로 사용할수있어서 구매해봤지만 사용해보고 재구매예정이에요~
reviews.content_en: Shipping was fast and the packaging was carefully wrapped in bubble wrap so no damage—love that~ The scrubber is even cuter than I expected and I can't wait to try cleaning dishes ㅎㅎ I haven't used it yet but just looking at it seems great~~ I bought it for multi-purpose use, but I'm planning to repurchase after I try it~~

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
본품은 품절이라 리필용으로 구매했어요~
리필용이 있다는게 가성비로도 굿!

아무래도 사람이 쓰는 제품보단 애견전용으로 사용하니 더 안심되네요!

세제는 조금만 사용해도 거품이 풍성해요!
식기류, 장난감, 의류등 토탈 세제이다 보니 별도 구분 없이 사용할 필요가 없어 간편해요!

아직까진 만족하며 사용중이라 다 쓰면 재구매 할 예정입니다 :)
reviews.content_en:
I bought the refill since the full bottle was out of stock~
It's great that there's a refill option—good value!

Using it as a dog-exclusive product is definitely more reassuring than using human products!

The detergent creates rich bubbles with just a little!
Since it's a total cleaner for dishes, toys, and clothes, I don't need to separate anything and can just use it—so convenient!

I'm satisfied with it so far and plan to repurchase once it's finished :)

reviews.name: 심****
reviews.content:
일반 주방세제로 닦으면 식기에 미끌거림이 남아서 두세번씩 닦거나 식초나 구연산물에 담궈뒀다 씻어서 번거로웠는데  바잇미 세제로 닦으니까 한번에 미끌거림이 싹 닦여서 놀랐어요. 생각보다 잘 닦이네요. 
수세미는 입모양 구멍에 끼우면 구멍이 커서 고정이 안되고옆으로 돌아가서 따로 보관하고 있어요.
수세미 귀엽고 잘 닦이는데 일반 스펀지라서 내구성이 좋지는 않네요. 새거 포장 뜯었을때부터 이미 스펀지가 조금씩 뜯겨있는 부분이 있었고 사용하다보니 뜯긴부분이 점점 찢어집니다. 수세미는 내구성에 비해 가격이 비싼 것 같아요.
가성비 있는 수세미로 자주 바꿔주는게 더 좋을 것 같네요.
세제는 생각보다 세척 효과가 좋아서 다쓰면 재구매 해야겠어요.
reviews.content_en:
When I washed with regular kitchen detergent, there was always a slippery residue on the dishes so I'd have to wash 2-3 times or soak it in vinegar or citric acid solution before washing—it was a hassle. But when I washed with BITE ME detergent, the slippery residue came right off in one go—I was shocked. It cleans better than I expected.
For the scrubber, when you fit it into the mouth-shaped hole, the hole is too big so it doesn't stay fixed and rotates, so I keep it separate now.
The scrubber is cute and cleans well, but being a regular sponge, it doesn't have great durability. Even when I opened the new package, the sponge was already slightly torn in spots, and as I use it, the torn parts keep ripping more. The scrubber seems overpriced for its durability.
I think it's better to replace the scrubber frequently with a more affordable option.
The detergent has better cleaning power than expected so I'll definitely repurchase once it's done.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
사용하던 제품이 있는데 용량도 혜자고 성분도 좋은 것 같아 갈아탔습니다.
포장도 꼼꼼히 해서 보내주셨고 스펀지 너무 귀여워요 ㅎㅎ
용량 넉넉하니 당분간은 걱정 없네요.
잘 쓰겠습니다!
reviews.content_en: I was using another product, but switched because the quantity was generous and the ingredients seemed great. The packaging was careful and thorough, and the sponge is so cute haha 😊 With plenty of product, I don't have to worry for a while. I'll use it well!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
우리 막내 전용 세제 유목민이었는데 이번에 정착하면 좋겠습니다♡
그동안 세탁세제 따로 썼고 식기는 물로만 닦거나 베이킹소다 이용했었는데
그동안 전부 만족하지 못했었어서 검색하다 바잇미 더블버블 택했습니다.
배송도 빨랐고요. 특별한 향이 강하게 느껴지지도 않고 거품은 아주 잘 납니다. 확실히 유해성분 없다 하니 믿음직스럽고 세척력 좋습니다♡
reviews.content_en: Our youngest has been using different detergents, but I hope this one will be the one we stick with ♡ I've been using separate laundry detergent and only rinsing dishes with water or baking soda, but I wasn't satisfied with any of them, so I searched and chose BITE ME Double Bubble. Shipping was fast too. The scent isn't overpowering and the bubbles are amazing. It's reassuring knowing there are no harmful ingredients, and the cleaning power is excellent ♡

reviews.name: 지****
reviews.content:
강아지 수건 빨래 할때나 식기 세척할때 다양하게 사용할 수 있는 아주 좋은 제품입니다~
세트할인으로 넉넉하게 구비해두어서 마음도 편해요ㅋㅋ
잘쓸게요^^
수세미 귀여워요😁
reviews.content_en: This is a great product that can be used in many ways, whether washing dog towels or cleaning dishes~ I stocked up with the set discount, so I have peace of mind too hehe 😄 I'll use it well^^ The sponge is so cute😁

reviews.name: 라****
reviews.content: 그동안 사람 세제로 강아지 식기 닦아줬었는데ㅜ 닦으면서도 찝찝했거든여ㅠ 근데 바잇미 세제로 바꾸고 식기 닦아주니까 넘 마음이 편안ㅋㅋㅋ 세제 조금만 해도 거품 잘 나는데 그 증정해주시는 수세미가 조금 불편하네요ㅜㅜㅋㅋ 쓰다가 다른 수세미로 바꿔야할거같아요ㅜ 세제는 무향이고 물로 헹구고 나면 미끌거림없이 뽀득한 느낌이 넘 좋네요^^
reviews.content_en: I used to wash my dog's dishes with human detergent ㅜ but I always felt uneasy while doing it ㅠ But after switching to BITE ME detergent, washing the dishes gives me so much peace of mind haha The detergent works great even with just a little, though the free sponge is a bit inconvenient ㅜㅜ I'll probably need to switch to a different sponge. The detergent is unscented and after rinsing with water, there's no slickness—just a nice squeaky clean feeling^^

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
강아지 식기며 장난감 세척시에 사람용껄로 하기에는
아무리 천연이고 순한 걸 사용한다한들, 찝찝한 느낌이 많이 들었었어요. 강아지꺼 세척할 땐 평상시보다 10배는 더 많이 헹구다 강아지 전용 세제가 있다는 걸 알고 주문하게 되었어요! 아무래도 강아지 전용이다보니 성분도 사람꺼와 다르게 순할 것이고 물고 빠는 장난감 세척 후에도 찝찝하지 않을 거 같아 주문하게 되었어요 ㅎㅎ
매일 세척하는 식기도 마음 편해졌고 직접 거품을 내 해보니 거품도 생각보다 많이나고 우선 이걸로 세척하면 뽀드득하면서 세척도 잘돼요! 일반 사람 세제로 할 때보다 헹굼시 거품도 덜 나는 기분이구요. 헹굼을 그렇게 수십번 하지 않아도 뽀드득하게 잘 씻겨지고 마음이 한결 편해졌어요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: When cleaning my dog's dishes and toys, using human detergent always left me feeling uneasy, no matter how natural or gentle it claimed to be. I used to rinse my dog's stuff 10 times more than usual! Then I found out there was dog-specific detergent and ordered it! Since it's specifically for dogs, the ingredients should be gentler than human detergent, and it shouldn't feel uneasy even after washing toys that get chewed on hehe When I tested making bubbles myself, they came out in abundance, and cleaning is really effective with a nice squeaky finish! I feel like there are fewer bubbles when rinsing compared to regular human detergent. Even without rinsing dozens of times, it cleans squeaky clean and I have so much more peace of mind now hehe

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
항상 식기 씻어줄때 마음이 놓이지 않았어요..!
사람한테도 좋지 않은 주방세제인데 하물며 고양이한텐 더 하겠죠 그러다가 바잇미에서 강아지 고양이 전용 세제를 찾게되었는데 마음이 놓이더라구요!! 
과일도 씻을수 있고 애기들도 사용할수 있다고 해서 구매를 결정했습니다!! 게다가 귀여운 수세미 까지~ 대만족ㅋ 
냄새도 거의 안나고 좋아요!! 강추합니다 !
reviews.content_en: I always felt anxious when washing dishes..! Regular kitchen detergent isn't even good for humans, let alone for cats. Then I found BITE ME's dog and cat-specific detergent and felt so much relief!! I decided to buy it because it can wash fruits and babies can use it too!! Plus the cute sponge~ I'm completely satisfied hehe The smell is barely noticeable and I love it!! Highly recommend!

reviews.name: 민****
reviews.content:
음..처음써봐서 그런건지 잘모르겠어요ㅜㅜ 저희는 아이 간식주는그릇이 좀 다양한데 플라스틱이나 스테인류는 잘닦이는거같은데 도자기류는 아이 침?그 미끌미끌한거까지 잘안닦이는 느낌이 들어서 2번씩 닦아요ㅜㅜ
그치만 수세미나 통은 너무 귀엽고 깜찍하다는.. 물론 가격도 너무 착해요!!!
reviews.content_en: Hmm, since it's my first time using it, I'm not sure ㅜㅜ We have various types of bowls for our child's snacks. Plastic and stainless steel clean well, but ceramic bowls don't clean as well—even the slimy residue from the child's saliva doesn't come off easily, so I wash them twice ㅜㅜ But the sponge and container are so cute and adorable.. And the price is super affordable!!!

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content: 진작 살걸!!! ㅠㅠ 다목적 세제가 있는 줄은 몰랐어요ㅠㅠ 물로만 닦자니 찝찝하고 일반 주방세제로 식기를 닦아주는게 맘에 걸렸거든요ㅠㅠ 배송 받자마자 그릇 씻고 왔는데 뽀득뽀득하니 넘 좋으네요 ㅎㅎ 같이 온 강아지 수세미 짱짱 좋은게 일단 귀엽고 ˃ᴗ˂ 한손에 착 들어오고 거품도 잘내줘요! 저는 수세미 보관 할때 첨부한 사진처럼 요러케 강아지 입을 세제 입구에 걸어서 보관하니까 좋으네용>_< 배송도 빠르고 너무 조아요ㅠㅠ 주말에는 장난감 싹 다 이 세제로 빡빡 빨아야겠어요! 그리고 다음에는 2세트 3세트로 사는걸로 •͈˽•͈ ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: Should've bought it sooner!!! ㅠㅠ I didn't know there was a multi-purpose detergent ㅠㅠ Just rinsing with water felt uneasy, and I was worried about using regular kitchen detergent on my pup's dishes ㅠㅠ I washed the bowls right after receiving it and they're so squeaky clean, love it hehe The dog sponge that came with it is awesome because it's cute first of all ˃ᴗ˂ and fits perfectly in one hand and makes great bubbles! I store the sponge by hanging the dog's mouth on the detergent opening like in the photo I attached, and it works great >_< Shipping was fast and I love it so much ㅠㅠ On weekends I'm going to scrub all the toys with this detergent! And next time I'm ordering 2-3 sets •͈˽•͈ hehe

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content:
(리뷰수정) 주문한 제품의 배송상태가 좋지 못해서 다음번엔 포장상태가 좋았으면 좋겠단 마음에 작성한 리뷰였는데, 고객센터에서 확인하시고 바로 교환 처리 해주시겠다고 하시더라구요! 그리고 곧바로 깨끗한 새 제품으로 발송해주셨습니다.🥹❤️ 
바잇미 세제 주문이 처음이 아니라 사용해보고 마음에 들어서 자주 이용중이었는데 이런 일이 처음이라 속상한 마음도 있었지만 바잇미의 빠른 일처리와 고객응대를 보니 역시 제가 잘 선택해서 사용중이었구나 싶더라구요 :) 감사합니다!!
reviews.content_en: (Review Updated) I initially wrote this review because the shipped product's packaging wasn't in good condition, hoping for better packaging next time. But the customer service team confirmed and immediately offered to replace it! And they quickly sent me a clean new product.🥹❤️ This wasn't my first BITE ME detergent order—I liked it after using it and have been a regular customer. This was my first issue, so I was upset, but seeing BITE ME's quick handling and customer service, I realized I made a great choice using their products :) Thank you!!

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 폭신한 스펀지와 함께 새로운 세척 세제가 나와 기존에 쓰던 제품 말고 새로운 제품 써보려고 주문했는데 거품도 완전 잘나오고 용량도 대용량이라서 주인님 그릇 세척, 옷 빨래, 화장실 세척 전부 다 이거 사용중이에요! 가격대비 성능 짱짱 뽀득뽀득 잘 닦여서 좋아요❤️
reviews.content_en: A fluffy sponge came with a new cleaning detergent, so I ordered to try the new product instead of what I was using. The bubbles form really well and it's a large quantity, so I'm using it for everything—washing dishes, laundry, bathroom cleaning! Great performance for the price, squeaky clean finish—love it❤️
